nasb.text: Six years you shall sow your field, and six years you shall prune your vineyard and gather in its crop,

esv.text: For six years you shall sow your field, and for six years you shall prune your vineyard and gather in its fruits,

cnv.text: 六年之內，你要耕種田地；六年之內，你要修剪葡萄園，收藏地的出產；

ccb.text: 六年之内，你们可以耕种田地，修整葡萄园，收获出产。
